# Cursor Changelog - Feature Announcements

## Apr 15, 2026 — Canvases
- Interactive canvases with dashboards and custom interfaces using tables, boxes, diagrams, and charts
- New artifact/workspace type for building visual dashboards from agent activity

## Apr 13, 2026 — Cursor 3.1
- **Tiled Layout** — Split current view into panes to run and manage several agents in parallel
- **Upgraded Voice Input** — Enhanced dictation with batch speech-to-text transcription and recording controls
- **Branch Selection** — Search and select git branches before launching cloud agents
- **Diff to File Navigation** — Jump from diffs to exact file lines with full editor capabilities
- **Search Filters** — Include/exclude filters for scoping code search to specific file sets

## Apr 8, 2026 — Bugbot Enhancements
- **Bugbot Learned Rules** — Self-improving code review; turns PR feedback signals into learned rules
- **Bugbot MCP Support** — MCP server access for additional context during code reviews
- **Bugbot Resolution Rate** — Improved to 78%
- **Bugbot "Fix All" Action** — Apply multiple Bugbot fixes in one operation

## Apr 2, 2026 — Cursor 3.0 Launch
- New Agents Window — parallel agent execution across local, worktrees, cloud, and remote SSH
- Design Mode — annotate UI elements directly in browsers
- Agent Tabs — side-by-side or grid view of multiple chats
- /worktree command, /best-of-n command
- MCP Apps support structured content
- Team-level Admin setting restricting cloud agent secret management
- Enterprise control to disable "Made with Cursor" attribution

## Mar 25, 2026 — Self-hosted Cloud Agents
- Run Cursor cloud agents entirely within your own network
- Same capabilities as Cursor-hosted agents: isolated VMs, full dev environments, multi-model harnesses, plugins

## Mar 19, 2026
- **Composer 2** — frontier-level coding performance

## Mar 11, 2026
- **New Marketplace Plugins** — 30+ plugins from Atlassian, Datadog, GitLab, Glean, Hugging Face, monday.com, PlanetScale

## Mar 5, 2026
- **Automations** — Always-on agents triggered by schedules or events from Slack, Linear, GitHub, PagerDuty, webhooks

## Mar 4, 2026
- **Cursor in JetBrains IDEs** — IntelliJ IDEA, PyCharm, WebStorm via Agent Client Protocol

## Mar 3, 2026 (Version 2.6)
- **MCP Apps** — Interactive UIs for charts, diagrams, whiteboards from Amplitude, Figma, tldraw
- **Team Marketplaces** — Private plugin marketplaces with governance and access controls

## Last Fetched
2026-04-19 — New entries: Canvases (Apr 15), Cursor 3.1 Tiled Layout/Voice/Branch Selection/Diff Nav/Search Filters (Apr 13)
